response.justification: Bogdan is a genuinely strong senior engineer with nearly two decades of breadth (web, embedded, low-latency systems) and authentic open-source credentials, including founding the GISCollective platform and contributing D-language tooling. However, this is an executive-level consulting leadership role in Germany requiring minimum C1 German, and his resume lists German as 'Basic' — a hard disqualifier for client-facing architecture and advisory work. He also shows little evidence of formal team leadership, technical project management, requirements management, or security/compliance advisory experience; his track record is that of an excellent individual contributor, not a Head of Development.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience (18+ years) spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput low-latency systems
Strong genuine open-source and Linux background: founder of an open-source GIS platform, D-language library author, FOSS4G speaker
Proven mentor and educator through workshops, courses, and code katas, relevant to team mentoring duties
concerns: German listed as 'Basic' versus the required C1 minimum for a German client-facing consulting role
No demonstrated formal leadership of teams or technical project/portfolio management at Head-of-Development level
No visible experience with UML/formal modeling, requirements management, or IT security, risk, and compliance advisory

key_factors.factor: German language gap (Basic vs required C1)
Lack of formal leadership and project management track record
Strong open-source, Linux, and broad systems engineering background
